rationale: Review 1's findings (missing import, unused open) are real but entirely off the placement rubric; Review 2 directly raises the placement question but its suggestion to move everything to Bialgebra/HopfAlgebra folders is a contested design call — the project roadmap deliberately places this as AlgebraicGroup Layer 0, so no maintainer would clearly insist on the restructuring, and the second finding about antipodeAlgHom cannot be confirmed from the diff.
